questions.q: Bees depend ………………… flowers and fruit to feed.
questions.exp: The correct answer is: on

questions.q: It ………………… be easy designing bridges; they are very complicated structures.
questions.exp: The correct answer is: can't

questions.q: The boy looks stressed. He ………………… faced some troubles at work lately.
questions.exp: The correct answer is: might have

questions.q: As most of the students failed the exam, it ………………… been an easy one.
questions.exp: The correct answer is: can't have

questions.q: The student was very lazy; he ………………… passed the exam with high marks.
questions.exp: The correct answer is: can't have

questions.q: The Australian aborigines look just like the Indians, they ………………… come from Asia.
questions.exp: The correct answer is: can’t have

questions.q: The explorers saw some wild animals in the desert.    (Make passive)
opts: Some wild animals are seen in the desert by the explorers.
Some wild animals were seen in the desert by the explorers.
Some wild animals have been seen in the desert by the explorers.
questions.exp: The correct answer is: Some wild animals have been seen in the desert by the explorers.

questions.q: Some engineers are building a very huge dam to keep the floods away. (Make passive)
opts: A very huge dam will be built by some engineers to keep the floods away.
A very huge dam has been built by some engineers to keep the floods away.
A very huge dam is being built by some engineers to keep the floods away.
questions.exp: The correct answer is: A very huge dam will be built by some engineers to keep the floods away.

questions.q: Some countries have cancelled all the flights because of the fog. (Make passive)
opts: All the flights are cancelled because of the fog by some countries.
All the flights were cancelled because of the fog by some countries.
All the flights have been cancelled because of the fog by some countries.
questions.exp: The correct answer is: All the flights have been cancelled because of the fog by some countries.

questions.q: The underlined word “takes place” in the 4th paragraph means:
questions.exp: The correct answer is: happens

questions.q: The underlined word “they” in the 3rd paragraph refers to:
questions.exp: The correct answer is: children

questions.q: By the time we ………………… to the stadium, the football match had already started.
questions.exp: The correct answer is: would arrive

questions.q: ………………… wasting your time, you'd better do some serious work.
questions.exp: The correct answer is: Instead of

questions.q: I can’t remember the time ………………… I joined the sports club.
questions.exp: The correct answer is: when

questions.q: I wish I ………………… the Eiffel Tower when I was in France last summer.
questions.exp: The correct answer is: had visited

questions.q: You should have waited for me.     (Make negative)
opts: You didn’t have to wait form me.
You shouldn’t have waited for me.
questions.exp: The correct answer is: You shouldn’t have waited for me.

questions.q: They closed all borders after the war.    (Make passive)
opts: All borders are closed after the war.
All borders were closed after the war.
All borders have closed after the war.
questions.exp: The correct answer is: All borders have closed after the war.

questions.q: We work long hours. We can finish soon.   (Join using: so that)
opts: We work long hours so that we can finish soon.
We work long hours so that we finished soon.
We work long hours so that we have finished soon.
questions.exp: The correct answer is: We work long hours so that we can finish soon.

questions.q: You have applied for the new job, …………………?  (Add a question tag)
opts: You have applied for the new job, didn’t you?
You have applied for the new job, haven’t you?
You have applied for the new job, aren’t you?
questions.exp: The correct answer is: You have applied for the new job, haven’t you?
